description: Two dayparts of one schedule whose days_of_week arrays are DISJOINT ([1]=Monday vs [2]=Tuesday) still overlap because the first wraps past local midnight: a Monday 22:00-06:00 daypart (DAT-072 wrap) carries a post-midnight tail onto Tuesday [00:00,06:00), which collides with a Tuesday 05:00-07:00 daypart on [05:00,06:00). Under the (weekday, time-of-day)-segment overlap test (DAT-073) this is rejected DAYPART_OVERLAP -- both would hold at Tue 05:30, and rejecting it preserves the single-holding-daypart-per-schedule precondition (DAT-077). A naive independent (days intersect) AND (time intersect) test would miss it, since {1} and {2} do not intersect.

errors.message: the Monday 22:00:00-06:00:00 daypart wraps past midnight (DAT-072) and its tail segment (weekday 2, [00:00:00,06:00:00)) intersects the Tuesday 05:00:00-07:00:00 daypart's segment (weekday 2, [05:00:00,07:00:00)) on [05:00:00,06:00:00); two dayparts of one schedule share a weekday and an intersecting half-open time-of-day range and MUST partition time, not layer
